topics.topic: Handling file uploads at scale in Laravel applications
topics.context: large file uploads, network failures, and storage management in production systems
topics.notes: include chunked uploads, presigned URLs, queue-based processing, and cleaning orphaned files

topics.topic: Implementing audit logs for critical actions in Laravel
topics.context: tracking user actions and system changes for debugging and compliance
topics.notes: include activity logging, storing changes, database structure, and querying logs efficiently

topics.topic: Designing a scalable caching strategy in Laravel
topics.context: reducing database load and improving response time in high-traffic applications
topics.notes: include Redis caching patterns, cache invalidation, tagging, and handling stale data

topics.topic: Handling scheduled tasks and cron jobs reliably in Laravel
topics.context: running recurring jobs, avoiding overlaps, and ensuring execution reliability
topics.notes: include Laravel scheduler, without overlapping, distributed locks, and monitoring failed tasks

topics.topic: Building a modular architecture in Laravel applications
topics.context: structuring large codebases into reusable and maintainable modules
topics.notes: include module separation, service providers, dependency management, and integration between modules

topics.topic: Designing multi-tenant data isolation in Laravel SaaS
topics.context: serving multiple tenants securely while keeping query performance predictable
topics.notes: include tenant resolution, row-level isolation vs schema-per-tenant, global scopes, and cross-tenant data leak prevention

topics.topic: Building resilient webhook consumers in Laravel
topics.context: processing webhook storms from payment and third-party providers without data corruption
topics.notes: include signature verification, idempotent processing, queue buffering, retry backoff, and dead-letter handling

topics.topic: Running zero-downtime database migrations in Laravel
topics.context: deploying schema changes safely under live traffic with backward compatibility
topics.notes: include expand-contract migration strategy, long-running lock avoidance, phased rollout, and rollback planning

topics.topic: Designing event-driven workflows in Laravel
topics.context: decoupling business processes with events and listeners while keeping consistency guarantees
topics.notes: include domain events, outbox pattern, eventual consistency trade-offs, and replay-safe consumers

topics.topic: Managing distributed locks and concurrency control in Laravel
topics.context: preventing race conditions across multiple workers and application instances
topics.notes: include Redis locks, lock expiration pitfalls, optimistic vs pessimistic locking, and contention monitoring

topics.topic: Implementing secure API authentication at scale in Laravel
topics.context: handling token issuance, rotation, and compromised credential scenarios in production
topics.notes: include Sanctum/Passport trade-offs, token scoping, refresh strategies, revocation, and audit trails

topics.topic: Building a robust background job architecture in Laravel
topics.context: processing high-volume asynchronous tasks with predictable latency and failure recovery
topics.notes: include queue partitioning, job prioritization, idempotent handlers, retry policies, and worker autoscaling

topics.topic: Designing observability and tracing for Laravel APIs
topics.context: debugging latency spikes and production incidents across services
topics.notes: include structured logging, correlation IDs, metrics dashboards, distributed tracing, and SLO-based alerts

topics.topic: Hardening rate limiting and abuse prevention in Laravel
topics.context: protecting APIs from bot abuse, brute force attempts, and cost amplification attacks
topics.notes: include per-user and per-IP throttles, adaptive limits, circuit breakers, and trusted proxy considerations

topics.topic: Designing reliable read/write database splitting in Laravel
topics.context: scaling reads with replicas while avoiding stale-read consistency bugs
topics.notes: include read-after-write consistency, sticky sessions, replication lag handling, and query routing strategies

topics.topic: Implementing soft delete retention and data lifecycle policies in Laravel
topics.context: balancing recovery needs, legal retention requirements, and storage costs
topics.notes: include archival workflows, delayed hard deletes, GDPR deletion requests, and restoring relational integrity

topics.topic: Scaling Laravel with Microservices and gRPC Communication
topics.context: building high-performance, low-latency inter-service communication in distributed systems
topics.notes: include Protobuf contracts, service discovery, error handling in gRPC, and comparing with REST overhead

topics.topic: Implementing Advanced Circuit Breakers for Resilient API Integrations
topics.context: preventing cascading failures when third-party services go down under heavy load
topics.notes: include open/closed/half-open states, fallbacks, timeout management, and integrating with Guzzle middleware

topics.topic: Mastering Eloquent Performance: Advanced Query Optimization and Indexing
topics.context: squeezing peak performance out of the ORM when dealing with millions of records
topics.notes: include composite indexes, selective loading, subquery joins, and analyzing EXPLAIN plans for Eloquent queries

topics.topic: Designing Distributed Transactions and the Saga Pattern in Laravel
topics.context: maintaining data consistency across multiple microservices without distributed locks
topics.notes: include choreographing events, compensating transactions, state management, and failure recovery strategies

topics.topic: Building a High-Performance Real-Time Engine with Laravel and WebSockets
topics.context: scaling real-time notifications to thousands of concurrent users effectively
topics.notes: include Reverb vs Pusher, horizontal scaling with Redis, presence channels, and secure broadcasting

topics.topic: Implementing Zero-Knowledge Data Encryption for Sensitive User Data
topics.context: protecting user privacy such that even database admins cannot read sensitive fields
topics.notes: include envelope encryption, key management with AWS KMS/HashiCorp Vault, and performance trade-offs

topics.topic: Designing a Robust Multi-Environment Content Delivery System
topics.context: orchestrating static and dynamic assets across staging, production, and edge locations
topics.notes: include CDN cache invalidation strategies, blue-green asset deployment, and origin shielding

topics.topic: Advanced Database Partitioning and Sharding Strategies in Laravel
topics.context: scaling horizontal write throughput when a single database server hits its hardware limits
topics.notes: include vertical vs horizontal partitioning, hash-based sharding, cross-shard query pitfalls, and migration paths

topics.topic: Implementing Secure OAuth2 and OpenID Connect Flows in Laravel APIs
topics.context: building professional-grade identity providers for third-party integrations
topics.notes: include authorization codes, client credentials, PKCE for mobile, and handling scope-based permissions

topics.topic: Designing an Advanced Analytics and Reporting Engine for SaaS
topics.context: providing real-time insights on massive datasets without slowing down the core application
topics.notes: include read-optimized schemas, pre-aggregations, using ClickHouse/Snowflake, and decoupled report generation
